chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.461 of 2024 Imam Bux Versus Bashir Ahmed and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No.2788/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 3. For order on CMA No.2789/2024 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For order on CMA No.2790/2024 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 04.11.2024 Mr. Mukhtiar Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Urgency granted. 2-5) Mr. Muhammad Umar Lakhani files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.1, which is taken on record. By virtue of this appeal an order dated 03rd October, 2024 is impugned whereby a notice under Section-17 of the Contempt of Court Ordinance, 2003 was issued as to why the contempt proceedings may not be initiated. The appellant could hardly be deemed to be aggrieved of said order as the opportunity was provided to the appellant to file a response to the contempt notice. This being a situation, no interference as such is required. The appeal is dismissed along with listed applications having no merit. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
